channel.title: Web3 Domain & Stablecoin Institute
channel.description: Latest content from the Web3 Domain & Stablecoin Institute

item.title: 2026-05-04 Crypto Payment and Domain Infrastructure Weekly Briefing
item.description: This week's observations on registrar payment policies, stablecoin payment infrastructure, DNS security, and Web3 domain research updates.

item.title: Cryptocurrency Domain Payment FAQ
item.description: Frequently asked questions about paying for domain registrations with cryptocurrency, covering BTC, ETH, USDC, and Solana payment methods.

item.title: DNS Security Governance FAQ
item.description: Frequently asked questions about DNS security governance, DNSSEC, DNS hijacking, and DNS-over-HTTPS.

item.title: Private Domain Registration FAQ
item.description: Frequently asked questions about private domain registration, WHOIS privacy, GDPR protections, and compliance boundaries.

item.title: Stablecoin Economy and Domain Payments FAQ
item.description: Frequently asked questions about stablecoin economics, USDT/USDC infrastructure, and their impact on domain payment systems.

item.title: USDT Domain Registration FAQ
item.description: Frequently asked questions about buying and registering domain names with USDT, covering payment methods, KYC, refunds, and compliance.

item.title: Web3 Domain Identity FAQ
item.description: Frequently asked questions about Web3 domain identity systems, ENS, Unstoppable Domains, and decentralized naming.

item.title: ENS (Ethereum Name Service): Architecture, Governance, and DNS Integration
item.description: ENS (Ethereum Name Service) glossary: smart contract architecture, .eth registry, DAO governance, DNSSEC bridge, and DNS integration.

item.title: USDT (Tether): Definition, Networks, and Domain Payment Applications
item.description: USDT (Tether) glossary: multi-network architecture across ERC-20, TRC-20, BEP-20, and its role in crypto domain registration payments.

item.title: WHOIS: Domain Registration Data, Privacy Frameworks, and RDAP Transition
item.description: WHOIS glossary: evolution to RDAP, GDPR impact on registrant data, WHOIS privacy services, and registrant rights under ICANN policy.

item.title: Domain Name Basics: DNS Hierarchy, Registration, and Management
item.description: An introductory course covering domain name fundamentals, the DNS hierarchy, ICANN's role, the domain lifecycle, and WHOIS basics for beginners entering the Web3 domain space.

item.title: USDT Basics: Stablecoin Mechanics, Networks, and Payment Use Cases
item.description: An introductory course on Tether (USDT) stablecoin fundamentals, peg mechanisms, network differences, transaction flows, domain payment applications, and key risks.

item.title: Buying Domains with Cryptocurrency: BTC, ETH, USDC, and Solana Payments
item.description: Comprehensive guide to purchasing domain names using various cryptocurrencies, covering BTC, ETH, USDC, and Solana payment methods, risks, and compliance requirements.

item.title: Complete Guide to Buying Domains with USDT: Process, Risks, and Compliance
item.description: Systematic overview of buying domains with USDT, covering registrar types, KYC, refunds, on-chain payment risks, and compliance boundaries.

item.title: Does Buying Domains with USDT Require KYC?
item.description: Explains KYC, invoicing, account risk controls, corporate purchasing, and compliance verification when buying domains with USDT.

item.title: TRC-20 vs ERC-20 for Domain Purchases
item.description: Compares TRC-20, ERC-20, and other chains for USDT domain purchases in terms of fees, confirmation speed, and cross-chain mistransfer risk.

item.title: Private Domain Registration: WHOIS Privacy, GDPR, and Compliance Guide
item.description: Comprehensive guide to private domain registration, covering WHOIS privacy services, GDPR data protection, and compliance boundaries for domain holders.

item.title: What Is WHOIS Privacy Protection
item.description: Explains the problems WHOIS privacy protection solves, visible information, TLD restrictions, RDAP relationships, and compliance boundaries.

item.title: 2026 DNS Security and Governance Report
item.description: Survey of DNSSEC, registrar locking, domain hijacking, ICANN governance, and registry security practices.

item.title: 2026 USDT Domain Registration Report
item.description: Annual observation framework for USDT domain purchases, covering registrar policy changes, chain selection differences, payment failures, privacy protection, and risk education.

item.title: DNS Security and Domain Governance Guide
item.description: Explains DNS, DNSSEC, domain hijacking, Registry Lock, ICANN governance, and registry security mechanisms.

item.title: Why DNSSEC Matters
item.description: Explains the role of DNSSEC, risks it can mitigate, enablement limitations, and relationship with domain registrar security capabilities.

item.title: Stablecoin Economic Impact Research
item.description: Research on stablecoin economic impact from the perspectives of cross-border payments, internet service procurement, crypto payment gateways, and financial stability risks.

item.title: Stablecoins and Domain Payment Infrastructure
item.description: Research on how stablecoins are entering domain registration, renewal, cross-border procurement, and internet infrastructure payment scenarios.

item.title: Web3 Domain Identity: Blockchain Naming Systems and Decentralized Identity
item.description: Research on Web3 domain identity systems including ENS, Unstoppable Domains, and the intersection of blockchain naming with decentralized identity and DNS governance.

item.title: USDT Domain Purchase Risk Checklist
item.description: Check chain selection, payment address, order timeout, KYC, refunds, invoicing, and domain security before buying domains with USDT.

item.title: WHOIS/RDAP Query Guide and Interpretation
item.description: Explains WHOIS and RDAP query results, public fields, privacy protection status, and compliant usage boundaries.

item.title: Research Mission
item.description: Explaining why this site researches crypto payments, domain infrastructure, Web3 identity, and the stablecoin economy.
